name: keyence-kvstudio-toolkit
purpose: Centralized reusable helpers for KEYENCE KV STUDIO local/VM code import/export, UI operation, conversion evidence, deterministic evidence review, and five-minute local acceptance.

stable_commands.purpose: Resolve local KV STUDIO shortcut/install to the real Kvs.exe before running automation.
Create a disposable local KV STUDIO project using Win32/UIAutomation controls, not image recognition.
Five-minute benchmark runner: create/open project, roundtrip MNM, run conversion evidence collection, and fail on timeout.
Check VM/tool prerequisites before touching KV STUDIO.
Stage a local PowerShell script into VM 103.
Run a staged VM-side script through the existing VM operator path.
Run a script in the logged-on VM desktop session.
Drive the KV STUDIO mnemonic-list export route.
Drive the KV STUDIO mnemonic-list import route. Use -FailOnMissingValidationNeedles for hard failure when expected devices/instructions are absent from post-import evidence.
Hard gate for MNM import/export: import an MNM, export it back, compare executable instruction fingerprints, and fail on mismatch.
Open a project, run Ctrl+F9, and collect screenshot/UI/clipboard evidence.
Copy the visible bottom conversion result tree after conversion.
Search KV project files for expected variables/modules as weak persistence evidence.
Verify VM101/102/103 can independently generate a minimal KEYENCE MNM from isolated CODEX_HOME skills and Wiki V2 without memory.
Create a deterministic git-backed evidence folder with source_snapshot, work, validation, review_inbox, agent_outbox, and HTML audit surfaces.
Force git diff capture and independent reviewer-agent audit for the current evidence folder.
Passively watch evidence folders with FileSystemWatcher and trigger review-evidence on file changes.

acceptance_gate: KV STUDIO project opens in the interactive desktop
program logic is imported or rebuilt through an accepted route
MNM import is followed by MNM export from the same project/module
roundtrip_mnm.ps1 reports matching executable instruction fingerprints for LD/LDB/AND/ANB/OUT/SET/RES/END/ENDH
variables and data types are registered in a compiler-accepted shape
evidence directory contains screenshot, UI dump, and copied conversion result
evidence loop audit.html records review path, execution path, diff artifacts, latest reviewer result, and implementation inbox delivery
known_limitations: MNM import without export-and-fingerprint comparison is only process evidence, not acceptance evidence.
The isolated VM smoke gate validates skill/tool availability and MNM generation, not full KV STUDIO compile or customer-program correctness.
Some older scripts are retained as evidence and must not be treated as stable automation.
